title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at H.B. Fuller India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at H.B. Fuller India
jsonLd.description:
We at H.B. Fuller India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About H.B. Fuller India:
H.B. Fuller India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India!
